title: [W]Describe the claim
label: [W]Describe the claim
p1: [W]This is an opportunity to explain why the claimant is making a claim to an employment tribunal.
p2: [W]It's important that you focus on setting out what happened to the claimant and explain, as far as you can, why the claimant thinks what happened was unlawful.
p3: Bydd yr hawliad yn cael ei anfon at yr atebwyr, a fydd yn cael cyfle i ymateb trwy’r tribiwnlys.
p4: [W]The tribunal will then decide (usually via a hearing) whether the respondents have acted unlawfully.
insetText: [W]We do not need detailed evidence, such as copies of emails, letters or other documents at this stage. Keep hold of these documents in case they are needed. You may need to bring them to a hearing.

collapsibleSection1.p1: Disgrifiwch y digwyddiadau mae'r hawlydd yn cwyno amdanynt.
collapsibleSection1.p2: [W]Try to give the dates of the events (and set them out in date order) and the names of other people involved. The claimant should explain as best as they can why they consider that these events mean they have been unlawfully discriminated against by reference to the protected characteristics they rely on.

collapsibleSection2.p1: [W]Describe the circumstances of the claimant's dismissal.
collapsibleSection2.p2: [W]Try to give dates of the events (like dismissal meetings) and the names of others involved (such as the person who dismissed the claimant). The claimant should explain as best they can, why they consider their dismissal was unfair.

collapsibleSection3.li1: [W]Give the dates of each time the claimant says they "blew the whistle" by making a protected disclosure. For each disclosure summarise the information they disclosed, whether it was done verbally or in writing, the person to whom you made the disclosure, what kind of wrongdoing they were disclosing, and why the disclosing was in the public interest.
collapsibleSection3.li2: Esboniwch sut gafodd yr hawlydd eu trin yn niweidiol (a all gynnwys cael eu diswyddo) oherwydd y datgeliad(au), gan nodi dyddiadau a chrynhoi’r digwyddiadau.
collapsibleSection3.li3: [W]Give the names of the people involved in and witness to these events and incidents.
collapsibleSection3.li4: [W]Describe how the claimant has been affected by the detrimental treatment.

collapsibleSection4.li1: [W]The tribunal can only hear cases where legislation gives it power to do so. Explain briefly, what legislation the claimant says covers this claim.
collapsibleSection4.li2: [W]Even if the claimant cannot, the most important thing is to explain what was done and so far as they can, why the claimant says it was unlawful. Give dates and brief details of each incident, including the name of the person responsible.

hint: [W]Use this to describe the events around the dispute, or add to your claim by uploading a document

fileUpload.label: [W]Upload a document that describes the claim (optional)
fileUpload.linkText: [W]Or upload your summary as a separate document (optional)
fileUpload.hint: [W]Upload a file that describes the claim. Maximum 50MB.
fileUpload.hintExisting: [W]Currently uploaded: {{filename}}. Upload a different file to replace it.

acceptedFormats.label: [W]Accepted formats
acceptedFormats.p1: [W]Accepted file formats are pdf, doc, docx, txt, dot, jpg, jpeg, bmp, tif, tiff, png, xls, xlt, xla, xlsx, xltx, ppt, pot, pps, ppa, pptx, potx, ppsx, rtf, csv.

claimSummaryText.required: [W]Tell us what happened, or upload a document describing the claim.

claimSummaryFileName.invalidFileFormat: [W]The file must be a DOC, DOCX, PDF, TXT or RTF
claimSummaryFileName.invalidFileName: [W]The file name must not contain special characters
claimSummaryFileName.backEndError: [W]There was an error uploading the file. Try again.
